goal: Ensure default harness patch proposals and state-backed proposals include a protocol eval command so release and promotion evidence is planned before implementation.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Harness patches can be proposed with broad cargo gates and replay checks but no explicit DeepSeek protocol eval, so protocol-aware release gates fail late instead of being planned in the patch lifecycle.
